name: @tootallnate/ff7-scene
description: Pure-JS parser for FF7 PC's `scene.bin` — the 256-entry archive of enemy / attack / formation / AI-script data used by every random encounter and boss fight. Decodes the gzip-block outer container, the 7808-byte per-scene struct, and the FF7 text encoding. Does NOT include an AI-bytecode disassembler (raw bytecode is exposed for callers that want one).
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
